summary: Comprehensive testing of CampusCrave multi-role food delivery platform completed successfully. All backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend testing shows excellent functionality across all three user roles with proper authentication flows, dashboard navigation, and core features working as expected.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console for accessibility

passed_tests: All authentication flows (student, outlet staff, admin)
Student dashboard: food courts browsing (8 venues found)
Student dashboard: provision stores browsing (3 venues found)
Venue menu modal opening and item selection
Add to cart functionality with quantity and special instructions
Cart page with item display and removal
Orders page with order history display
Outlet staff Kanban board with 4 columns (Incoming, Preparing, Ready, Picked Up)
Order status updates in Kanban board
Admin analytics dashboard with total orders, revenue, and charts
